commands.repair_reason: - No ClawSweeper repair lane is needed because the PR has no blocking findings; maintainers should let checks finish and review or land it normally.; Cleared: The diff touches task attribution runtime code and tests only; I found no dependency, workflow, secret, permission, or supply-chain change. commands.review_summary:
The PR attributes spawned subagent task records to the executing child agent by passing `targetAgentId` through subagent registration and inferring from `childSessionKey` before parent ownership, with registry and SQLite regression tests.

PR surface: Source +6, Tests +105. Total +111 across 6 files.

Reproducibility: yes. at source level: current main builds a child session key from the target agent but task creation resolves `agentId` from explicit, owner, then requester fields without considering the child key. I did not run a live `sessions_spawn` turn in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - No ClawSweeper repair lane is needed because the PR has no blocking findings; maintainers should let checks finish and review or land it normally.

target.title: fix: attribute spawned task runs to child agent
